result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  dotnet-suggest [command] [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  list                          Lists apps registered for suggestions
  get                           Gets suggestions from the specified executable
  register                      Registers an app for suggestions
  script <Bash|PowerShell|Zsh>  Print complete script for specific shell

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  dotnet-suggest [command] [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  list                          Lists apps registered for suggestions
  get                           Gets suggestions from the specified executable
  register                      Registers an app for suggestions
  script <Bash|PowerShell|Zsh>  Print complete script for specific shell

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Gets suggestions from the specified executable

Usage:
  dotnet-suggest get [options]

Options:
  -e, --executable <executable>  The executable to call for suggestions
  -p, --position <position>      The current character position on the command line [default: 32767]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Registers an app for suggestions

Usage:
  dotnet-suggest register [options]

Options:
  --command-path <command-path>              The path to the command for which to register suggestions
  --suggestion-command <suggestion-command>  The command to invoke to retrieve suggestions
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  dotnet-suggest register [options]

Options:
  --command-path <command-path>              The path to the command for which to register suggestions
  --suggestion-command <suggestion-command>  The command to invoke to retrieve suggestions
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Print complete script for specific shell

Usage:
  dotnet-suggest script <ShellType> [options]

Arguments:
  <Bash|PowerShell|Zsh>

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
